name: mindtrain
description: Conversational knowledge training backed by a private MindTrain instance.

interface.shortDescription: Connect to a private MindTrain instance for knowledge training
interface.longDescription: Configure a private MindTrain instance, then train, ask follow-up questions, grade answers, schedule reviews, and inspect learning reports in Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use $mindtrain to configure my private MindTrain instance.
Use $mindtrain to start today's training session.
Use $mindtrain to review my learning backlog.
